title: AI's REAL Strength: Greenfield Projects, Not Legacy Code! #shorts
summary: AI performs well on greenfield projects but faces significant challenges integrating into legacy systems due to poor documentation and high complexity. The author argues that legacy system integration is the real bottleneck for AI adoption, not the technology itself.
writeup: This short from Cyril Imhof contrasts AI's performance on greenfield projects with its struggles inside legacy systems. The argument: AI handles new builds well, but integration into existing codebases is hampered by poor documentation and high complexity. The takeaway is that legacy system integration, not the underlying technology, is the real bottleneck for AI adoption.
